title: poa elatior
intro: Poa elatior, also known as the meadow grass or June grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene compounds. The health benefits of Poa elatior include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Poa elatior can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
